steps.title: Find the vertex input
steps.content:
For $p(x)=2x^2+20x+15$, the parabola opens upward because $a=2$. Its minimum occurs at the vertex input:
$$
x=-\frac{b}{2a}=-\frac{20}{2(2)}=-5
$$

steps.title: Evaluate the function
steps.content: Substitute $x=-5$ to find the minimum value: $$ p(-5)=2(-5)^2+20(-5)+15 $$ $$ p(-5)=50-100+15=-35 $$ The answer is A.
